response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY Job
PK job_id
ATTR job_id : integer : PK
ATTR job_date : date
ATTR client_id : integer : FK

ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar

ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar

ENTITY JobStep
PK job_step_id
ATTR job_step_id : integer : PK
ATTR job_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR step_sequence : integer
ATTR scheduled_quantity : integer
ATTR start_datetime : timestamp
ATTR cost : float

REL JobStep -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL JobStep -> Job : 1 -> 1..N : FK=job_id
REL JobStep -> Operation : 1 -> 1..N : FK=operation_id
REL JobStep -> Material : 1 -> 1..N : FK=material_id
